stemHtml: Which of the following best defines an alternate aerodrome?

options.a: An aerodrome to which a flight may proceed when it becomes either impossible or inadvisable to proceed to or to land at the aerodrome of intended landing.
options.b: A backup aerodrome filed in the flight plan but never used in practice.
options.c: The nearest suitable aerodrome to the destination.
options.d: An aerodrome with weather conditions always above planning minima.
